justification: Based on the provided notice, Gemini is not explicitly authorized to collect or use precise device location data from users who have not granted location permissions. The user's privacy should be respected and no location data should be accessed without explicit consent.

source_excerpts.quote: You can exclude these [browser remote] data at any time in the Data from browser remote setting.
Saiba mais. (Know more. This implies a user has the option to opt-out of location sharing)

quote_verification.model_quote: You can exclude these [browser remote] data at any time in the Data from browser remote setting.
quote_verification.policy_quote: Para desconectar os apps de mensagens e ligações a qualquer momento, basta acessar as configurações de "Apps conectados". Saiba como gerenciar apps conectados no Gemini.
